focus: Renewals coordination - detect upcoming expirations, score renewal risk, recommend capped rent, prepare decision briefs, and QA the renewal pipeline
goals: Review every lease expiring within the configured intake window
Score renewal risk using payment, lease, inspection, and compliance signals
Recommend rent from a documented market or manager-comp anchor within the configured cap
Prepare decision-ready renewal briefs for property-manager approval
QA renewal tracker rows for missing data, stale decisions, and executor handoff gaps
